queries.label: Single Term Rank
queries.description: Rank by frequency of the term 'fiber'.

queries.label: Multi-term AND (Implicit)
queries.query: switch fiber ORDER BY SCORE DESC
queries.description: High rank for records containing both terms.

queries.label: Multi-term OR
queries.query: switch OR fiber ORDER BY SCORE DESC
queries.description: Rank records matching either term.

queries.label: Exact Phrase Search
queries.description: Find exact matches for the phrase.

queries.label: Note Relevance
queries.description: Find records with 'backbone' in any field.

queries.label: Weighted Discovery
queries.query: cloud analytics ORDER BY SCORE DESC
queries.description: Discover related infrastructure components.

queries.label: Rare Term Boost
queries.description: Rare terms get higher IDF scores.

queries.label: Common Term Penalty
queries.description: Common terms get lower relevance weight.

queries.label: Scoring + Filter
queries.query: country = "USA" AND cloud ORDER BY SCORE DESC
queries.description: Relevance ranking within a specific country.

queries.label: Fuzzy Relevance
queries.description: Rank by similarity to a misspelled term.

queries.label: Exact Match
queries.description: Simple equality check.

queries.label: Not Equal
queries.description: Exclude a specific category.

queries.label: Numeric Range (>)
queries.description: Filter by high salary values.

queries.label: Numeric Range (<)
queries.description: Find low-cost products.

queries.label: Between Range
queries.description: Find values in a specific range.

queries.label: In-List Membership
queries.description: Match any value in the provided list.

queries.label: Active State
queries.description: Filter by boolean status.

queries.label: Inactive State
queries.description: Filter by inactive records.

queries.label: Multiple Equality
queries.description: Strict multi-field match.

queries.label: Negative Selection
queries.description: Select everything except one country.

queries.label: Array Contains
queries.description: Find records where the tag list includes 'fiber'.

queries.label: Array Intersection
queries.description: Find records having both specific tags.

queries.label: Skills Search
queries.description: Find records with specific skill arrays.

queries.label: Nested Object Match
queries.description: Search inside the 'meta' object using dotted paths.

queries.label: Nested Ownership
queries.description: Filter by sub-property.

queries.label: Existence Check
queries.description: Find records where a nested field is present.

queries.label: Null Check
queries.description: Find records with missing notes.

queries.label: Not Null Check
queries.description: Find records that have populated notes.

queries.label: Array Empty Check
queries.description: Find records with no tags.

queries.label: Complex Nested Logic
queries.description: Mix nested fields with array contents.

queries.label: Prefix Wildcard
queries.description: Match names starting with 'Prod'.

queries.label: Suffix Wildcard
queries.description: Match notes ending with 'backbone'.

queries.label: Middle Wildcard
queries.description: Contains search using wildcard syntax.

queries.label: LIKE Pattern (%)
queries.description: SQL-style wildcard matching.

queries.label: LIKE Character (_)
queries.description: Match single character placeholders.

queries.label: Regex Search
queries.description: Powerful regular expression matching.

queries.label: Fuzzy Search (Levenshtein)
queries.description: Find 'monitoring' even with a typo.

queries.label: Global Numeric (>)
queries.description: Search ALL numeric fields for values greater than X.

queries.label: Global Numeric (<)
queries.description: Find any record with any field value less than 100.

queries.label: Combined Smart Search
queries.description: Mix text term with global numeric comparison.

queries.label: Column Selection
queries.description: Return only specific fields.

queries.label: Select SCORE
queries.query: SELECT name, SCORE WHERE fiber ORDER BY SCORE DESC
queries.description: Include the relevance score in results.

queries.label: Multi-Column Sort
queries.query: ORDER BY country ASC, salary DESC
queries.description: Sort by country, then highest salary.

queries.label: Ranked Multi-Sort
queries.query: fiber ORDER BY country ASC, SCORE DESC
queries.description: Alpha sort by country, best match within.

queries.label: Pagination (Limit)
queries.description: Get only the first 5 records.

queries.label: Offset (Skip)
queries.description: Skip records for pagination.

queries.label: Nulls First Sort
queries.query: ORDER BY notes ASC NULLS FIRST
queries.description: Control where null values appear in sort.

queries.label: Nulls Last Sort
queries.query: ORDER BY notes ASC NULLS LAST
queries.description: Push nulls to the bottom of the list.

queries.label: Strict Mode Search
queries.description: Disable type coercion during search.

queries.label: Case Sensitive Search
queries.description: Enforce case matching.
